versions.notes: xAI added Grok 4.20 (grok-4.20-0309-reasoning) to the official Chat API pricing table at the current Grok flagship price: input 1.25, cached input 0.20, output 2.50 USD per 1M tokens, 1M context window. Kept grok-4.3 because it remains listed on the pricing page. Re-checked all tracked providers against their official pricing pages: OpenAI GPT-5.5/5.5 Pro (no GPT-5.6/6), Anthropic (Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5; Mythos 5 still limited-availability), Google (Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, 3.5 Flash; no 3.6/4.x), DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash, Zhipu GLM-5.2/5.1/5-Turbo, Alibaba (Qwen3.7 Max/Plus, Qwen3.6 Flash; no Qwen3.8 or Qwen3.7 Flash), ByteDance Seed 2.1/2.0, Kimi K2.6/K2.7 Code, MiniMax M3, and Xiaomi MiMo V2.5/Pro all unchanged and carried forward. Updated the default USD/CNY rate from ExchangeRate-API.

ByteDance: Volcengine Ark launched the new-generation Doubao Seed 2.1 series ("最新模型：Seed 2.1"), replacing Seed 2.0 at the flagship slot on the standard pay-as-you-go (标准按量付费) table. Added doubao-seed-2.1-pro (new flagship Coding & Agent model; single 0-256k tier: input 6 CNY, cache hit 1.2 CNY, cache storage 0.017 CNY/1M/hour, output 30 CNY per 1M tokens) and doubao-seed-2.1-turbo (scaled-production tier: input 3 CNY, cache hit 0.6 CNY, cache storage 0.017 CNY/1M/hour, output 15 CNY per 1M tokens). Both support text/image/video understanding (no audio) with a 256k context window. Removed doubao-seed-2.0-pro, which Seed 2.1 Pro supersedes as the flagship (Seed 2.0 is now the previous generation). Kept doubao-seed-2.0-lite and doubao-seed-2.0-mini (still GA on the page, prices unchanged, no Seed 2.1 lite/mini equivalent yet). Re-checked all tracked providers against their official pricing pages: OpenAI GPT-5.5/5.5 Pro (no GPT-5.6/6), Anthropic (Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5; Mythos 5 still limited-availability), Google (Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, 3.5 Flash; no 3.6/4.x), DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash, xAI Grok 4.3, Zhipu GLM-5.2/5.1/5-Turbo, Alibaba (Qwen3.7 Max/Plus, Qwen3.6 Flash; no Qwen3.8 or Qwen3.7 Flash), Kimi K2.6/K2.7 Code, MiniMax M3, Xiaomi MiMo V2.5/Pro all unchanged and carried forward. Updated the default USD/CNY rate from ExchangeRate-API.

Zhipu: added GLM-5.2 (glm-5.2), Zhipu's new long-task flagship, now listed on the official BigModel pay-as-you-go pricing page (previously subscription-only). Text model with a 1M context window: input 8 CNY, output 28 CNY, cache hit 2 CNY per 1M tokens (single 0-1M tier; cache storage limited-time free). Left GLM-5.1 and GLM-5-Turbo in place (both still offered on the pay-as-you-go page, prices unchanged). Re-checked all tracked providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, xAI, Zhipu, Alibaba, ByteDance, Kimi, MiniMax, Xiaomi) against their official pricing pages: OpenAI GPT-5.5/5.5 Pro, Anthropic (Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5; Mythos 5 still limited-availability), Google (Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, 3.5 Flash; no 3.6/4.x), DeepSeek V4, xAI Grok 4.3, Alibaba (Qwen3.7 Max/Plus, Qwen3.6 Flash; no Qwen3.8 or Qwen3.7 Flash), ByteDance Doubao Seed 2.0 pro/lite/mini (standard pay-as-you-go), Kimi K2.6/K2.7 Code, MiniMax M3, Xiaomi MiMo V2.5/Pro all unchanged and carried forward. Updated the default USD/CNY rate from ExchangeRate-API.

Alibaba: refreshed the whole Qwen flagship lineup to its current generation (the prior snapshots had fallen behind and missed the 3.6/3.7 releases). Replaced Qwen3 Max -> Qwen3.7 Max (qwen3.7-max, GA = qwen3.7-max-2026-05-20) at $2.5 input / $7.5 output per 1M tokens (single 0-1M tier); Qwen3.5 Plus -> Qwen3.7 Plus (qwen3.7-plus, GA = qwen3.7-plus-2026-05-26) at $0.4 input / $1.6 output (<=256k) and $1.2 input / $4.8 output (256k-1M); Qwen Flash/Qwen3.5 Flash -> Qwen3.6 Flash (qwen3.6-flash, GA = qwen3.6-flash-2026-04-16) at $0.25 input / $1.5 output (<=256k) and $1 input / $4 output (256k-1M). All three carry a 1M-token context window; Max is text-only, Plus and Flash are text/image/video. International (USD) pay-as-you-go pricing read from the official Model Studio table. There is no Qwen3.7 Flash yet, so the flash tier tracks the latest 3.6. Re-checked all other tracked providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, xAI, Zhipu, ByteDance, Kimi, MiniMax, Xiaomi) against their official pricing pages; their prices and model lineups are unchanged and carried forward. Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5 remains limited-availability (not generally available) and is not added. Zhipu's GLM-5.2 is still not on the pay-as-you-go page. No other prices changed.

Added Kimi K2.7 Code (kimi-k2.7-code), the newest model in Kimi's K2 line, generally available on the Kimi platform at $0.95 input cache miss / $0.19 input cache hit / $4 output per 1M tokens, with a 262k-token context window and text/image/video input. Kimi K2.6 remains offered and is carried forward. Re-checked all other tracked providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, xAI, Zhipu, Alibaba, ByteDance, MiniMax, Xiaomi) against their official pricing pages; their prices and model lineups are unchanged and carried forward. No other prices changed.

Anthropic added Claude Fable 5 (claude-fable-5), its new most-capable widely released model, generally available on the Claude API starting 2026-06-09 at $10 input / $12.50 5m cache write / $20 1h cache write / $1 cache hit / $50 output per 1M tokens, with a 1M-token context window and text+image input. Claude Mythos 5 was also announced but is invitation-only (Project Glasswing, not generally available) and is intentionally not tracked. Re-checked all other tracked providers (OpenAI, Google, DeepSeek, xAI, Zhipu, Alibaba, ByteDance, Kimi, MiniMax, Xiaomi) against their official pricing pages; their prices and model lineups are unchanged and carried forward. No other prices changed.

Updated MiniMax M3 pricing for inputs above 512k tokens: the official MiniMax pay-as-you-go page now applies the permanent 50% discount to this tier, halving input to 0.6, output to 2.4, and prompt-cache read to 0.12 USD per 1M tokens. The at-or-below-512k tier is unchanged at 0.3/1.2/0.06 (its discount is now described as permanent). Re-checked all other tracked providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, xAI, Zhipu, Alibaba, ByteDance, Kimi, Xiaomi) against their official pricing pages; their prices are unchanged and carried forward. Corrected MiMo V2.5 input modalities to text, image, audio, and video per Xiaomi's official platform documentation, which describes V2.5 as natively multimodal (successor to MiMo-V2-Omni); MiMo V2.5 Pro remains text-only. No prices changed.

Replaced MiniMax M2.7 models with MiniMax M3 after checking the official MiniMax pay-as-you-go pricing page. MiniMax M3 supports a 1M context window and uses separate prices for input at or below 512k tokens and input above 512k tokens. DeepSeek V4 Pro prices are unchanged, but the discount-period note was replaced with the official post-promotion pricing note. Expanded Doubao Seed 2.0 pricing into official input-length tiers from Volcengine. Other tracked prices are carried forward from the previous snapshot.

versions.notes: Replaced Claude Opus 4.7 with Claude Opus 4.8 after checking official provider pricing pages. Opus 4.8 keeps the same standard Claude API token prices as Opus 4.7. Other tracked standard token prices were rechecked and no additional changes were applied. CNY rows are converted to USD for sorting and comparison with the displayed USD/CNY rate.

Expanded provider dataset. Prices come from official public pricing pages and preserve the provider's official currency. CNY rows are converted to USD for sorting and comparison with the displayed USD/CNY rate. Prices do not include batch, priority, tool-call, regional uplift, free-tier, or limited quota promotions unless the condition explicitly says so.
